title: KeyCps
description:
This mod lets you see your CPS on left mouse button and right mouse button.
It even works if you bind place or attack to a keyboard button and shows the corresponding cps for the keyboard repeat rate.
body:
This mod lets you see your CPS on left mouse button and right mouse button.
It even works if you bind place or attack to a keyboard button and shows the corresponding cps for the keyboard repeat rate.
